notes_on_what_changed: Started a formal Golgi production restart while preserving previous Golgi work as reference evidence.
Created only Golgi_RootRig and WholeCell_ContextSocket as manifest components.
Added review-only placement and cis/trans direction guides; they are excluded from export.
No cisternae, faces, vesicles, cargo markers, dispatch vesicles, or interaction hotspots were built in Phase 1.
next_recommended_phase: Phase 2: build organic gold/yellow curved Cisterna_Stack, Cis_Face, Trans_Face, and early Budding_Vesicles only after this formal Phase 1 gate passes.
do_not_advance_if: Any formal Phase 1 render is missing without a recorded pending reason.
Review-only guides appear in export candidates.
Any manifest component name drifts from component_manifest.json.
Nucleus Phase 08R is represented as complete without real Roblox package IDs and Studio/play-mode validation.
